steps.title: Use the margin of error
steps.content: A margin of error gives a plausible interval around the estimate. Subtract and add $0.11$ to the estimated mean price $3.76$.

steps.title: Compute the plausible interval
steps.content:
Find the lower and upper bounds:
$$3.76-0.11=3.65$$
$$3.76+0.11=3.87$$
So the plausible mean price is between $\$3.65$ and $\$3.87$. The answer is A.
